label: A2A (Agent-to-Agent)
description: Agent-to-Agent protocol — alias of agent_spawn that takes a 'prompt' (instead of 'task') and routes through openagentic-proxy.

settings.name: task
settings.label: Task (alias)
settings.description: Legacy alias for prompt — used when prompt is unset.

ai.shortDescription: Call a peer agent via the A2A protocol.
ai.whenToUse: When one agent needs to delegate to another agent (peer-to-peer), e.g. a planner asking a researcher.
ai.examplePrompt: ask the researcher agent to summarize the latest news on the topic from the trigger

outputAssertions.name: agent_returned_content
outputAssertions.errorMessage: A2A peer did not return any content.

outputAssertions.name: agent_completed_status
outputAssertions.errorMessage: A2A peer did not complete successfully.

outputAssertions.name: agent_substantive_output
outputAssertions.expression: !result || !result.content || !result.content.match(/^\s*(I (could not|couldn't|cannot|can't|do not have|don't have|am unable|wasn't able|was not able)|Sorry,? (I|but)|I'?m sorry,?|I apologize,?|Unfortunately,? (I|no)|No (information|data|results|content) (available|found))/i)
outputAssertions.errorMessage: A2A peer returned a refusal or 'no info' response.
